headline: Energy Resets After Rally. Technical Indicators Say It’s Time to Buy These Stocks.
summary: Energy currently makes up only about 4% of the  a historically low weighting despite its importance to the global economy.  As the AI buildout accelerates demand for electricity, data centers, and reliable baseload power, energy infrastructure and fuel supply will have to play a larger role than the index weighting suggests.  In that setting, let’s look at  Chevron Phillips 66  and  EQT Corp.  and analyze their technical positions.

headline: Phillips 66 unveils new gas processing and fractionation projects in Texas (PSX)
summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) announced plans to develop two new midstream infrastructure projects, including the Zeus Gas Plant and a third Coastal Bend Fractionator, with both facilities expected to begin operations in 2028. New Permian gas plant to expand processing capacityThe Zeus project will consist of a natural gas processing facility capable of handling 300 million cubic feet per day in the Permian Basin.
